rationale.R1.4: Novelty claim should be qualified; both components individually have clear prior art.
rationale.R1.7: Citation and scholarship are mostly correct, but the paper could benefit from more precise citation of related work.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is partially addressed, but some claims seem overly confident without sufficient evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is good; the system covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is mostly correct, but some minor regressions are noted in the evaluation.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are mostly correct, but some non-cosmetic changes could be annotated with source and reason.
